notes: The file proves [K(E):K(E)^q]=q via a tower-law through K(x^q), using Algebra.finrank_eq_of_equiv_equiv to transfer finranks across ring equivalences — a pattern later copied in Basic.lean for mulByInt. The 153-line central proof finrank_over_frobenius_image uses three nested sub-computations and two set_option overrides with no justifying comments. No sorries anywhere in the file.
